name: Parmesan Thin Crust Pizza Dough <St>
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Donna German
Combine the ingredients in a bread machine according to your machine's instructions. Use the dough cycle.
Store the pizza dough in a loosely wrapped plastic bag in the refrigerator for up to one week. When ready to use, remove the dough from the refrigerator and let it come to room temperature before rolling out, topping with your favorite ingredients, and baking.
Preheat oven to 500°F (260°C). For pizza pans, preheat for at least 30 minutes. For stone, preheat for 1 hour to properly heat the stone.
Bake for 15-20 minutes.
